ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sale transaction was created */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the sale */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code used for the sale */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount applied to the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the store */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the store */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the store */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the store's website */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of the store (e.g., online, physical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer joined the platform */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the customer */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the customer */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the product should be reordered */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store managed by the manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the manager was hired */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_managers_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_program" (
  "loyalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points accumulated by the customer */,
  "redemption_date" TEXT /* Date when the points were redeemed */,
  "points_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the loyalty points */,
  "points_earned_date" TEXT /* Date when the points were earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_program_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity_on_hand" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product currently in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock falls below the reorder level */,
  "last_order_date" TEXT /* Date of the last order placed for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales report */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store for which the report is generated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the reporting period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the period */,
  "total_items_sold" INTEGER /* Total number of items sold during the period */,
  "number_of_customers" INTEGER /* Number of unique customers in the report period */,
  "average_order_value" REAL /* Average value of orders placed during the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory report */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "total_stock_value" REAL /* Total value of the inventory */,
  "low_stock_items" INTEGER /* Number of items with low stock */,
  "number_of_out_of_stock_items" INTEGER /* Number of items that are out of stock */,
  "total_items" INTEGER /* Total number of items in stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_reports_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer report */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "purchase_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of purchases made by the customer */,
  "average_order_value" REAL /* Average value of orders placed by the customer */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_reports_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "predicted_sales" REAL /* Predicted sales for the product */,
  "predicted_stock_needs" INTEGER /* Predicted stock needs for the product */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_method" TEXT /* Method used for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
